prompt: Japanese Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock print style. A lone traveler descending a steep mountain path in small careful steps, feeling the slope with each foot. Mount Fuji visible in background. Flat unmodulated areas of color — indigo, ochre, vermillion, ivory. Bold black outlines. Visible woodgrain texture throughout. Diagonal composition. Stylized clouds. No photographic shading, no gradients, no western perspective. Katsushika Hokusai style. No text, no labels.
tradition_approach: Flat unmodulated color areas, bold black outlines, visible woodgrain texture, diagonal composition, and Hokusai-style figure-ground contrast with muted indigo and ochre palette.
